heroHeadline: Myanmar Civil War: Junta Controls ~20% of Territory as Resistance Forces Dominate
heroSubtitle: Five years after the February 2021 coup, the SAC military junta faces coordinated offensives on seven fronts. The Three Brotherhood Alliance, KIA, Karenni forces, PDF, and the Arakan Army (controlling 90% of Rakhine State) have fundamentally shifted the conflict's balance. Over 3.6 million people are internally displaced and 22,668 remain political prisoners.
footerNote: Data sourced from AAPP, ACLED, UN OCHA, Irrawaddy, RFA, Myanmar Now, DVB, Human Rights Watch, Crisis Group, and official NUG and EAO statements.
